name: tucson-hackathon
description: Curated Claude Code skills for founders launching real businesses in a weekend. Built for AI Hackathon 3 (Tucson, May 23-24, 2026).

plugins.name: landing-pages
plugins.description: Ship a live, branded landing page in under an hour — fake-door pages, conversion audits, one-command deploy.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.description: Find prospects, write outreach, run discovery calls, and collect your first payment.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Positioning, SEO, paid ads, and launch posts that move customer-conversation and experiment metrics.

plugins.name: product
plugins.description: Turn an idea into testable hypotheses, scope an MVP, and decide pivot-or-persist on a clock.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Customer interviews, competitor scans, market sizing, and transcript-to-insight extraction.

plugins.name: content
plugins.description: Brand voice, LinkedIn posts, newsletters, decks, and a demo-day narrative built from your logs.

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Frontend scaffolds, payment-link wiring, deploys, MCP integrations, and the ngrok AI Gateway bootstrap.

plugins.name: operations
plugins.description: Milestones, scheduling, expense tracking, status updates, and sponsor handoff docs.
